name: Peanut Butter Cookies#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Cream together the shortening, peanut butter, granulated sugar, brown sugar, and vanilla using an electric mixer at medium speed for one minute. Add the egg and milk, then beat until well blended.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together the flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt. Gradually add this dry mixture to the creamed ingredients, mixing well until combined.
4. Using rounded tablespoons of dough, shape each cookie on an ungreased cookie sheet. Flatten the cookies in a crisscross pattern with a fork dipped in flour. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes.
5. Allow the cookies to cool for 2 minutes before removing them from the cookie sheet and transferring them to a cooling rack. Makes approximately 2 dozen cookies.
Source: Crisco
Typed by Lois Flack, Cyberealm BBS, Watertown, NY.
